data.name: Continuum - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
SEX IS AN ART, SO YOU NEED TO BE AN ARTIST

You play as a young man who enrolls in a prestigious academy of arts against his father’s wishes. He does not yet know who he will become or where this choice will lead. All he has is a desire to achieve great heights and prove that the chosen path is not a mistake.

However, adult life changes everything. The academy is full of beautiful girls, freedom, and temptation. The atmosphere quickly awakens new feelings and desires. His authoritarian upbringing has given him a strong drive to achieve. This drive cannot be eliminated. It can only be redirected. Gradually, he realizes that art is not limited to brushes and canvases. The beauty of the female body, relationships, intrigue, and perversions can also be a form of creativity.

Will it be a warm romantic relationship with the girl you love? Or will you immerse yourself in the boldest sexual fantasies and fetishes? You will have to walk your own path and strive for perfection.

UNIQUE AND LIVING CHARACTERS

22 main girls, each one handcrafted with the finest details in appearance, personality, and backstory. They feel real emotions — love, pain, jealousy, and dreams. Each girl has her own personal drama and secrets that only you can uncover. Their stories cross paths, creating a unique atmosphere and unlocking unexpected opportunities.

EVERY DECISION MATTERS

Building relationships is complex. Even the smallest details make a difference. Don’t be afraid to mess up or make the wrong move. You’ll have a chance to fix things — and maybe even deepen the connection because of it.

CHOOSE YOUR PLAYSTYLE

  • Romance. Find the one girl who makes you forget all the rest. Build a deep, sincere, and emotional connection that’s truly yours.

  • Fallen Angel. Your path is seduction and the freedom to explore the darkest fantasies. Reveal each girl’s hidden desires. Break their moral boundaries and lead them into a world of forbidden pleasure. Find the key to every heart and become the one who changes their idea of lust and satisfaction forever.

A VISUAL DELIGHT

Created with professional 3D technology, the game offers exceptional detail and realism in every scene and character. You’ll experience vivid, emotionally charged dates, intense sensual scenes, and an unforgettable atmosphere — every frame crafted with care and love.

data.short_description: A visual novel about love, creativity, and tough choices — where the fates of dozens of unique heroines lie in your hands. Dive into deep emotions, difficult decisions, and the sweet taste of forbidden desires.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Window 10
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 630
